text.title: App Store Optimization (ASO) Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of App Store Optimization (ASO).

example.scenario: Solo iOS habit tracker, 600 monthly installs, plateaued ranking.
example.trace: research → 8 keywords (habit, tracker, goals, …) → title 'Habit Coach: Daily Goals' → 3 value-prop screenshots → review prompt after 7-day streak completed → re-baseline in 30 days
